name: mate-harness
description: MATE project harness — inventories the rules, subagent, commands, and scripts tuned for this repo.

mcp_servers.description: No external MCP servers are used by MATE. Add one only after the user approves it (see rules/security.md).

commands.description: Slash commands for the project's real workflows. Located in .claude/commands/.

items.name: test
items.description: Run the unit + integration test suite.

items.name: ingest
items.description: Rebuild the Laws-of-the-Game RAG index (Docling + Granite).

subagents.description: One lean, repo-aware reviewer. Located in .claude/agents/subagents/.

items.name: code-reviewer
items.role: Reviews a change against MATE's constraints, correctness, tests, grounding, and style. Returns APPROVED / CHANGES REQUIRED / BLOCKED.

rules.description: Behavioural rules, trimmed to this local MVP. Located in .claude/rules/.

items.name: security
items.description: Consent before integrations, secrets handling, .env protection, input grounding.

items.name: testing
items.description: unittest unit + integration; sandbox-mirror run workflow.

items.name: preferences
items.description: Neat, readable, fail-safe code; no over-engineering.

items.name: validate
items.description: Python sanity gate: py_compile + line-length (hard), module-docstring (warn).

exit_codes.1: Python syntax error (style issues are warnings)
